title: leiophyllum serpyllifolium
intro: Leiophyllum serpyllifolium, also known as Rosemary-leaved Rockrose, is a shrub-like perennial plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems, due to its expectorant and carminative properties. The health benefits of Leiophyllum serpyllifolium include relief from coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as alleviation of indigestion and nausea. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to promote relaxation and ease respiratory discomfort.
